info.title: VS.TestPlaylistTools
info.description: A .NET library for creating, parsing, and manipulating Visual Studio test playlist files. Supports advanced playlist building and integration with test runners.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert TRX file(s) to a Visual Studio Test Playlist

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to the output playlist file or directory. If not specified, the playlist will be saved in the same directory as the first trx file with the same name but with .playlist extension.

options.name: --outcome
options.description: Test outcomes to include (e.g. Passed Failed Skipped). Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --skip-empty
options.description: Do not write a playlist file if there are no tests in the playlist.

options.name: --separate
options.description: When multiple TRX files are provided, create separate playlist files for each instead of merging into one. Output path must be a directory.

arguments.name: trx-files
arguments.description: Path(s) to the TRX file(s) to convert. Multiple files can be specified to merge into a single playlist.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge multiple playlist files into a single playlist with de-duplicated tests

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to the output merged playlist file. If not specified and all input files are in the same directory, the merged file will be created in that directory.

options.name: --skip-empty
options.description: Do not write a playlist file if there are no tests in the merged playlist.

arguments.name: playlist-files
arguments.description: Path(s) to the playlist file(s) to merge. Supports glob patterns (e.g., *.playlist, **/*.playlist). Tests will be automatically de-duplicated.
